billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and billing
billing.trialBanner: Your free trial ends in {days} days — link your payment method now
billing.trialBannerGeneric: You are on a free trial — link your payment method to avoid interruption
billing.graceBanner: Your trial has ended. Subscribe now to avoid losing access.
billing.pastDueBanner: Payment failed. Update your payment method.
billing.foundingPrice: Founding partner price — locked for life
billing.choosePlan: Choose a plan and link your payment method
billing.pastDueDescription: Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
billing.graceDescription: Your trial has ended. You have a few days to subscribe before your account is paused.
billing.confirmUpgradeDescription: You'll be upgraded from {from} (€{fromPrice}/mo) to {to} (€{toPrice}/mo). The price difference will be prorated for the rest of your current billing period.
billing.confirmDowngradeDescription: You'll be downgraded from {from} to {to}. A credit for the difference will be applied to your next invoice. Make sure your current usage fits within the new plan's limits.
billing.suspendedDescription: Your free trial has ended. Subscribe to restore full access to your loyalty program.
billing.suspendedDataSafe: Your data is safe. All customers, stamps, and designs are preserved.
billing.trialSwitchHint: Your free trial continues — you won't be charged until it ends.
billing.prorationHint: You'll be charged or credited the difference for the remaining billing period.
billing.trialSubscribeHint: Link your payment method now to avoid losing access. Your free trial continues and you won't be charged until it ends.
billing.activeInTrialInfo: You're all set! Your free trial continues for {days} more days. Your first charge will be after the trial ends.
billing.billingStartsSoon: Your first billing is in {days} days — no action needed.
